name: 29_Financial_Time_Series_Prediction_LSTM_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuanzisha mfumo wa utabiri wa mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha kwa kutumia mfano wa LSTM na Uchambuzi wa Kifedha wa ulimwengu halisi, kama bei za hisa au bei za Bitcoin? Kwanza, tutahitaji kusafisha data, tukishughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, hebu tukaibadilishe data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa muundo wa kujifunza unaosimamiwa kwa kutumia dirisha la muda katika `src/data_loader.py`. Hatimaye tumia mfano wa LSTM kwa utabiri, ambapo mfano wa LSTM unatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Ukishapata utabiri, hifadhi matokeo kama `results/prediction_results.txt`. Unda dashibodi ya maingiliano inayoonyesha matokeo ya utabiri kwa kutumia Dash na hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/visualize.py`. Hatimaye, ningefurahia hati ya Markdown inayoonyesha usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na uchambuzi wa utendaji, iliyohifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`. Hakikisha mfumo unasimamia kuanza na kusimamisha programu ya Dash kiotomatiki ili kuokoa rasilimali. Asante sana!

requirements.criteria: Baadhi ya data halisi ya mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha (mfano, "bei za hisa" au "bei za Bitcoin") inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usafishaji wa data unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza linalosimamiwa. Tafadhali tekeleza hili katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa utabiri wa mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha na unatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Dashibodi ya maingiliano ya kuona matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash". Utekelezaji unahifadhiwa katika `src/visualize.py`.
Hati ya Markdown inayoonyesha usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na uchambuzi wa utendaji inazalishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi ya "Dash" inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuingiliana na matokeo ya utabiri, kuwezesha uchunguzi wa vipindi tofauti vya muda na kukuza vipindi maalum kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kusimamia kiotomatiki kuanza na kusimamisha programu ya "Dash" ili kuzuia matumizi yasiyo ya lazima ya rasilimali.

judge_stats.criteria: Baadhi ya data halisi ya mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha (mfano, "bei za hisa" au "bei za Bitcoin") inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual loading of real-world financial time series data. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation:

- The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no actual data loading logic.
- There is no use of any financial data APIs (e.g., `yfinance`, `pandas_datareader`), no CSV file reading, and no connection to any data source for stock prices or Bitcoin prices.
- The keywords "Bitcoin prices" and "stock prices" appear only in a `KEYWORDS` list as strings, not as part of any functional data loading code.
- The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it is not a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Usafishaji wa data unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a hardcoded string `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and does not perform any actual data loading, let alone data cleaning. There is no code for handling missing values (e.g., `dropna()`, `fillna()`, interpolation) or outlier detection/removal. The `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list merely mentions these requirements as text strings but does not implement them. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — a placeholder, not a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza linalosimamiwa. Tafadhali tekeleza hili katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement a time window (sliding window) to convert time series data into a supervised learning problem. The file contains only a placeholder implementation with `load_dataset()` returning a dummy dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and `build_transforms()` returning a static list. There is no actual code for loading financial data, creating sequences/windows from time series, or generating input-output pairs (X, y) for supervised learning. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no actual implementation was executed or saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa utabiri wa mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha na unatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual LSTM model. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder that lists LSTM as a keyword in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS` lists, but provides no real LSTM architecture. The `build_model()` function simply returns a string `"model placeholder"` without any actual neural network implementation. There is no import of any deep learning framework (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras), no LSTM layer definition, no model training logic, and no genuine time series prediction functionality.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/prediction_results.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual prediction results. This indicates that the model was not properly trained and executed to generate real financial time series predictions. The file does not contain meaningful prediction data such as predicted values, actual values, timestamps, or any metrics that would be expected from an LSTM model's output.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya maingiliano ya kuona matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash". Utekelezaji unahifadhiwa katika `src/visualize.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/visualize.py` file does not contain an actual implementation of an interactive Dash dashboard. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — essentially a stub/placeholder that defines metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `main()` function that simply returns a dictionary with status "ok". There is no actual Dash code (e.g., `import dash`, `app = dash.Dash(...)`, layout definitions, callbacks, or any real visualization logic). The file is not a functional interactive dashboard but merely a skeleton acknowledging the requirement exists.
